Uses of Class
com.onlinepayments.domain.DetokenizedTokenResponse

  • Packages that use DetokenizedTokenResponse 
    Package Description
    com.onlinepayments.domain  

    • Uses of DetokenizedTokenResponse in com.onlinepayments.domain

      Methods in com.onlinepayments.domain that return DetokenizedTokenResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      DetokenizedTokenResponse DetokenizedTokenResponse.withCardBrand(String value)
      The brand of the card (e.g., VISA, MasterCard).
      DetokenizedTokenResponse DetokenizedTokenResponse.withCardExpiryDate(String value)
      The expiration date of the card in MMYY format, where MM represents the two-digit month and YY represents the two-digit year.
      DetokenizedTokenResponse DetokenizedTokenResponse.withCardHolderName(String value)
      The full name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.
      DetokenizedTokenResponse DetokenizedTokenResponse.withEncryptedCardNumber(String value)
      The card number, encrypted and Base64 encoded for secure transport.
      DetokenizedTokenResponse DetokenizedTokenResponse.withPaymentId(String value)
      The unique identifier for the payment associated with the token is necessary for tracking.
      DetokenizedTokenResponse DetokenizedTokenResponse.withSchemeReferenceData(String value)
      Reference data associated with the payment scheme for the credentials on file.
      DetokenizedTokenResponse DetokenizedTokenResponse.withToken(String value)
      The unique identifier for the token is required for processing.
      Methods in com.onlinepayments.domain that return types with arguments of type DetokenizedTokenResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      List<DetokenizedTokenResponse> DetokenizationResponse.getTokens()
      The response contains an array of detokenized data for the provided token IDs, which includes card details and expiration dates.
      Method parameters in com.onlinepayments.domain with type arguments of type DetokenizedTokenResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void DetokenizationResponse.setTokens(List<DetokenizedTokenResponse> value)
      The response contains an array of detokenized data for the provided token IDs, which includes card details and expiration dates.
      DetokenizationResponse DetokenizationResponse.withTokens(List<DetokenizedTokenResponse> value)
      The response contains an array of detokenized data for the provided token IDs, which includes card details and expiration dates.
